arts.sum: Following the 0-0 draw with Derby County on Tuesday night, Burnley fans will be hoping that the Clarets can return to winning ways against the Canaries at Turf Moor.

arts.ttl: Norwich move quickly to tie player to new deal – Contract already signed, transfer risk working out
arts.sum: Emiliano Marcondes is set to stay at Norwich City for another year after they extended his deal until 2026. That’s according to Tipsbladet, who report that Marcondes has extended his deal with the Canaries until next summer after his current contract was due to expire this year. arts.ttl: Norwich visit 'massive' for Burnley boss Parker
arts.sum: Norwich City's Championship trip to face Burnley is "massive" for the hosts, according to Clarets head coach Scott Parker.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker issues rallying call ahead of Burnley's final five games - starting with Norwich City
